title: Regulating and Balance Power, Overall Data (Discontinued, please read description) (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] This dataset has been Discontinued. Data is available in [Imbalance Price](https://www.energidataservice.dk/tso-electricity/ImbalancePrice) and [mFRR Energy Activation Market](https://www.energidataservice.dk/tso-electricity/MfrrEnergyActivationMarket).

In connection with the go-live of the new imbalance price design, the dataset [Imbalance Price](https://www.energidataservice.dk/tso-electricity/ImbalancePrice) was introduced, replacing [Regulating and Balance Power, Overall Data](https://www.energidataservice.dk/tso-electricity/RegulatingBalancePowerdata). The dataset is in 15-minute resolution and contains all the components relevant to the imbalance price, including the imbalance price, aFRR volume-weighted average price, and mFRR marginal price.

mFRR activation, balance power prices and imbalance, overall data.
